formName: Step 4 - Land Information - Private Affected Land Details for Water Licence Application
formDescription: This section collects details for land that is physically affected by the project works. It includes information about the land owner, civic address or location description, official legal description, and metes and bounds for unsurveyed land.

LandOwnershipCategory.title: What is the category of land ownership?
LandOwnershipCategory.description: Identifies the classification of the affected land as Private, Provincial Crown, or Other.

LandOwnerAffected.title: Name of owner of land that is affected by your works:
LandOwnerAffected.description: The full legal name of the individual or organization that owns the affected land parcel.

CivicAddressOther.title: Civic address or other location description of affected land:
CivicAddressOther.description: The street address or a descriptive location of the affected property.

LegalDescription.title: Legal Description:
LegalDescription.description: The official legal description of the property as found on the land title.

MetesAndBounds.title: Metes and Bounds (description of unsurveyed land):
MetesAndBounds.description: A technical description of the boundaries for land that has not been formally surveyed.

CertificateOfTitleNo.title: Certificate of Title No:
CertificateOfTitleNo.description: The registration number of the Certificate of Title for the affected property.
